/usr/bin/ar qc libneuron-core.a "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/object.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/index.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/tree.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/commit.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/refs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/repository.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/graph.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/negotiate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/packfile.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/walker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/mmap.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/neuron-core.dir/core/src/pack_index.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libneuron-core.a
